description_long: This chaise features a plush, deep burgundy cushion with a gently curved top surface, providing a comfortable seating area. The cushion is supported by a dark wooden frame, which is visible along the lower edge and forms the base structure. The legs are elegantly curved, crossing in an X-shape at the center, and are finished in a matching dark wood tone, giving the piece a refined and modern appearance. The upholstery appears to be a solid, velvety fabric, adding a touch of luxury and softness to the overall design. There are no visible armrests or backrest, emphasizing its minimalist and open form. The chaise is compact and low to the ground, making it suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or sidewalk seating areas.
description: A low, burgundy-upholstered chaise with a curved cushion and dark wooden X-shaped legs, featuring a minimalist, armless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved cushion and the elegant X-shaped wooden legs crossing at the center.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight alignment of the back legs and the continuous cushion surface.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the gentle curve of the cushion and the full profile of the X-shaped legs.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, similar to view 1, with the straight back legs and the plush cushion visible.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no visible backrest on this chaise; the seating surface is open and unobstructed, emphasizing a minimalist, backless design.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are crafted from dark wood and form an elegant X-shape, curving outward from the center for both stability and visual appeal. The finish is smooth and polished, with no visible decorative carvings.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid burgundy color with a velvety texture, showing no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached cushion forming the seat of the chaise, with a gently curved top surface and no additional or loose cushions visible.
